manifest.title: Theme Configurator Example
manifest.description: Exercises a DOCUMENT-SCOPE configurator (E4-S2): a `configurator` whose `target` is the reserved `$theme` keyword routes to the document THEME scope rather than an item id. The resolver reads the `$theme` configurable surface declared on the dashboard schema (the six base theme tokens) and auto-generates a document-level editor form from it — one `select` control per token, each bound to the `$theme.<token>` config-override address. The configurator is wrapped in a block inside a body region (a content leaf must be block-wrapped). Generation only: the document's authored default theme is passed through verbatim, never mutated. Conforms to https://lattice.dev/schemas/dashboard/1.0.0.
manifest.author: Lattice
